targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN '💡' ELSE '⭘' END AS icon,
  o.name AS room,
  CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS state,
  cs.ts AS updated
FROM objects o
JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
WHERE o.house_id = 'house'
  AND o.tags LIKE '%light%' AND o.tags LIKE '%control%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, room

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(e.ts, $__interval),
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/6') AS "Гостиная",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/7') AS "Кухня",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/4') AS "Спальня",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/3') AS "Холл",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/2') AS "Тамбур",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/9') AS "Серверная"
FROM events e
WHERE e.house_id = 'house'
  AND e.ga IN ('1/2/6','1/2/7','1/2/4','1/2/3','1/2/2','1/2/9')
  AND $__timeFilter(e.ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(e.ts, $__interval),
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/12') AS "Настя",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/13') AS "Тим",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/14') AS "Кабинет",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/15') AS "Холл 2эт",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/1') AS "Крыльцо",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/2/5') AS "Терраса"
FROM events e
WHERE e.house_id = 'house'
  AND e.ga IN ('1/2/12','1/2/13','1/2/14','1/2/15','1/2/1','1/2/5')
  AND $__timeFilter(e.ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
